personal.name: Keertana P K
personal.title: Electronics Engineer • Data Analyst • Future AI Builder
personal.tagline: Designing intelligent systems where electronics meets data, and ideas turn into real-world impact.
personal.bio: Final-year Electronics Engineering student passionate about data analytics, intelligent systems, and building meaningful tech solutions. I love turning messy data into insights, ideas into systems, and concepts into real-world implementations. My work sits at the intersection of engineering, data, and creativity.
personal.currentFocus: Data Analytics • Intelligent Systems • Real-Time Applications
personal.availability: Open to internships and entry-level roles

about.title: About Me
sections: I’m someone who genuinely enjoys figuring things out — whether it’s analyzing a dataset, designing an antenna, or building a system from scratch. My journey in Electronics Engineering has helped me explore both hardware and software, but I found my strongest interest in data and intelligent systems.

I enjoy working on projects that combine logic, creativity, and real-world application. From building intrusion detection systems to analyzing market datasets, I focus on creating solutions that are not just technical but meaningful.
Currently, I’m exploring opportunities in data analytics, AI-driven systems, and tech consulting where I can grow, contribute, and build impactful solutions.

experience.title: AI + Design Thinking Intern
experience.description: Worked on real-world problem solving using design thinking and AI-powered no-code/low-code platforms. Learned how to transform ideas into digital solutions quickly using modern tools.
impact: Built solution prototypes using AI tools
Applied design thinking to real problems

projects.title: Smart IoT Home Monitoring System
projects.description: Real-time environmental monitoring using IoT sensors
projects.longDescription: Built a smart monitoring system that collects temperature and humidity data using sensors and displays it through a real-time dashboard. Focused on usability and real-time insights.

projects.title: Real-Time Intrusion Detection System
projects.description: ML-based system to detect malicious network activity
projects.longDescription: Developed a machine learning-based IDS that analyzes network traffic and classifies it as normal or suspicious. Integrated with a live dashboard for monitoring.

projects.title: Smartphone Market Analytics
projects.description: Data analysis project uncovering pricing and trend insights
projects.longDescription: Cleaned and analyzed smartphone datasets to extract insights about pricing, ratings, and specifications. Built visual dashboards and predictive models.

projects.title: Traffic Pattern Intelligence System
projects.description: Analyzing traffic trends for smarter insights
projects.longDescription: Analyzed traffic datasets to identify congestion trends and peak hours, demonstrating how analytics can improve smart city planning.

achievements.title: Published Research Paper
achievements.description: Authored a research paper on compact microstrip patch antenna design focusing on miniaturization and performance optimization.

activities.title: National Service Scheme (NSS)
activities.description: Actively contributed to community service initiatives including outreach programs, social awareness campaigns, and campus engagement activities.
